purpose: Prepare a current-build versus tracked-golden comparison packet before any protected golden or release-state mutation is considered.

queue_contract.blocked_until: explicit release-operator approval after visual dogfood comparison

human_question: Should the release operator approve, reject, or defer the protected tracked-golden baseline change after reviewing a current-build versus tracked-golden comparison?
agent_recommendation: Defer protected golden or release-state mutation until the comparison packet has been reviewed; do not run force-golden from this Wave C packet.

choices.label: Approve protected golden roll-forward
choices.risk: Mutates tracked golden export artifacts and changes the release baseline.

choices.label: Reject and keep tracked golden baseline

follow_up.after_decision: record rejection rationale, then rerun /fig_queue --mode review --goal wave-c-target-selection

choices.risk: Leaves the current generated export divergent from the tracked golden baseline.

choices.label: Defer for comparison dogfood

follow_up.after_decision: prepare or inspect the comparison view; do not mutate source, accepted state, release state, or tracked golden artifacts

choices.risk: Release remains blocked at the protected tracked-golden boundary.

disallowed_actions: do not edit figure source files
do not edit generated exports or tracked golden artifacts
do not run --force-golden from this packet

follow_up.implementation_slice: Prepare a benchmark comparison packet before any force-golden or release-state mutation is considered.
